---
title: "Lab Notebooks"
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .nb-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }
  .nb-card {
    position: relative;
    border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
    transition: box-shadow .15s ease, transform .15s ease;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: .35rem;
  }
  .nb-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.12); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .nb-card .nb-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.02rem; }
  .nb-card a.nb-link { font-size: .85rem; word-break: break-all; }
  .nb-card .nb-title { font-size: .85rem; font-style: italic; color: #24292f; line-height: 1.3; }
  .nb-card .nb-date { font-size: .8rem; color: #57606a; margin-top: auto; }
  .nb-card.nb-recent {
    border-color: #d97706;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217,119,6,.25);
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(217,119,6,.08), transparent 60%);
  }
  .nb-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: -10px;
    right: 10px;
    background: #d97706;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: .68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .03em;
    padding: .15rem .5rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    display: none;
  }
  .nb-card.nb-recent .nb-badge { display: inline-block; }
</style>

<div class="nb-grid" id="nb-grid"></div>

<script>
(function () {
  // type: 'gh' = GitHub Pages notebook. Prefer its RSS feed (gives post title + date);
  //   fall back to the commits API (date only) when no feed exists.
  // type: 'wp' = a genefish.wordpress.com author, matched by login.
  var notebooks = [
    { name: "Sam White",        url: "https://robertslab.github.io/sams-notebook/",        type: "gh", repo: "RobertsLab/sams-notebook",        feed: "https://robertslab.github.io/sams-notebook/index.xml" },
    { name: "Steven Roberts",   url: "https://sr320.github.io/tumbling-oysters/",          type: "gh", repo: "sr320/tumbling-oysters",          feed: "https://sr320.github.io/tumbling-oysters/index.xml" },
    { name: "Aspen Coyle",      url: "https://aspencoyle.github.io/notebook/",             type: "gh", repo: "aspencoyle/aspencoyle.github.io", feed: "https://aspencoyle.github.io/feed.xml" },
    { name: "Chris Mantegna",   url: "https://chrismantegna.github.io/labnotebook/weeklyupdates.html", type: "gh", repo: "ChrisMantegna/labnotebook", feed: "https://chrismantegna.github.io/labnotebook/weeklyupdates.xml" },
    { name: "Zach Bengtsson",   url: "https://zbengt.github.io/notebook/",                 type: "gh", repo: "zbengt/zbengt.github.io",         feed: "https://zbengt.github.io/feed.xml" },
    { name: "Celeste Valdivia", url: "https://valeste.github.io/tough-tunicates/",         type: "gh", repo: "valeste/tough-tunicates" },
    { name: "Grace Crandall",   url: "https://grace-ac.github.io/notebook/",               type: "gh", repo: "grace-ac/grace-ac.github.io",    feed: "https://grace-ac.github.io/feed.xml" },
    { name: "Kathleen Durkin",  url: "https://shedurkin.github.io/Roberts-LabNotebook/",   type: "gh", repo: "shedurkin/Roberts-LabNotebook", feed: "https://shedurkin.github.io/Roberts-LabNotebook/daily_log.xml" },
    { name: "Ariana Huffmyer",  url: "https://ahuffmyer.github.io/notebook.html",          type: "gh", repo: "AHuffmyer/ahuffmyer.github.io",  feed: "https://ahuffmyer.github.io/notebook.xml" },
    { name: "Megan Ewing",      url: "https://meganewing.github.io/mewing-notebook/",      type: "gh", repo: "meganewing/mewing-notebook" },
    { name: "Jesse Lowe",       url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/jlowe50bd14a0c15/",    type: "wp", login: "jlowe50bd14a0c15" },
    { name: "Hazel Abrahamson", url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/hnote22/",             type: "wp", login: "hnote22" },
    { name: "Samuel Slutz",     url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/samuelos1e4f4cd96e/",  type: "wp", login: "samuelos1e4f4cd96e" },
    { name: "Christina Zhang",  url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/qingrz2/",             type: "wp", login: "qingrz2" },
    { name: "Maddy Bernstein",  url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/maddyab/",             type: "wp", login: "maddyab" },
    { name: "Sophie Lord",      url: "https://genefish.wordpress.com/author/soplo27/",             type: "wp", login: "soplo27" }
  ];

  var grid = document.getElementById("nb-grid");
  var fmt = function (d) {
    return d.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { year: "numeric", month: "short", day: "numeric" });
  };

  // Build cards up front
  notebooks.forEach(function (nb, i) {
    var host = "";
    try { host = new URL(nb.url).hostname; } catch (e) { host = nb.url; }
    var card = document.createElement("div");
    card.className = "nb-card";
    card.id = "nb-card-" + i;
    card.innerHTML =
      '<span class="nb-badge">★ Active</span>' +
      '<span class="nb-name">' + nb.name + '</span>' +
      '<a class="nb-link" href="' + nb.url + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' + host + '</a>' +
      '<span class="nb-title" id="nb-title-' + i + '"></span>' +
      '<span class="nb-date" id="nb-date-' + i + '">Loading…</span>';
    grid.appendChild(card);
    nb.titleEl = document.getElementById("nb-title-" + i);
    nb.dateEl = document.getElementById("nb-date-" + i);
  });

  function applyPost(nb, dateStr, title) {
    if (title) nb.titleEl.textContent = "“" + title + "”";
    if (dateStr) {
      nb.date = new Date(dateStr);
      nb.dateEl.textContent = "Last post: " + fmt(nb.date);
    } else {
      nb.dateEl.textContent = "Date unavailable";
    }
  }

  // Parse the newest entry (title + date) from an RSS or Atom feed string
  function parseFeed(xml) {
    var doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(xml, "application/xml");
    if (doc.querySelector("parsererror")) return null;
    var item = doc.querySelector("item") || doc.querySelector("entry");
    if (!item) return null;
    var t = item.querySelector("title");
    var d = item.querySelector("pubDate") || item.querySelector("published") || item.querySelector("updated");
    return {
      title: t ? t.textContent.trim() : null,
      date: d ? d.textContent.trim() : null
    };
  }

  function highlightRecent() {
    var cutoff = Date.now() - 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // posts within the last two weeks
    notebooks.forEach(function (nb, idx) {
      if (nb.date && nb.date.getTime() >= cutoff) {
        document.getElementById("nb-card-" + idx).classList.add("nb-recent");
      }
    });
  }

  var pending = notebooks.length;
  function done() { if (--pending === 0) highlightRecent(); }

  // Fetch all genefish posts once, map login -> latest {date, title}
  var wpDone = fetch("https://public-api.wordpress.com/rest/v1.1/sites/genefish.wordpress.com/posts/?number=100&fields=date,title,author")
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (data) {
      var latest = {};
      (data.posts || []).forEach(function (p) {
        var login = p.author && p.author.login;
        if (!login) return;
        if (!latest[login] || new Date(p.date) > new Date(latest[login].date)) {
          latest[login] = { date: p.date, title: p.title };
        }
      });
      return latest;
    })
    .catch(function () { return {}; });

  // GitHub notebook with no feed: fall back to the latest commit date (no post title)
  function ghCommitFallback(nb) {
    return fetch("https://api.github.com/repos/" + nb.repo + "/commits?per_page=1")
      .then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : []; })
      .then(function (commits) {
        var d = commits && commits[0] && commits[0].commit && commits[0].commit.committer && commits[0].commit.committer.date;
        applyPost(nb, d, null);
      })
      .catch(function () { applyPost(nb, null, null); });
  }

  notebooks.forEach(function (nb) {
    if (nb.type === "gh") {
      if (nb.feed) {
        fetch(nb.feed)
          .then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.text() : null; })
          .then(function (xml) {
            var post = xml && parseFeed(xml);
            if (post && (post.date || post.title)) { applyPost(nb, post.date, post.title); return; }
            return ghCommitFallback(nb);
          })
          .catch(function () { return ghCommitFallback(nb); })
          .then(done);
      } else {
        ghCommitFallback(nb).then(done);
      }
    } else {
      wpDone.then(function (latest) {
        var p = latest[nb.login];
        applyPost(nb, p && p.date, p && p.title);
      }).then(done);
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
